## Honest limits / caveats

1. The cmd_handle assignment assumes `URepLayout::InitFromClass`
   walks `PropertyLinks` order filtered by `CPF_Net` and assigns
   `cmd_handle = 1 + index`. This is the UE5 stock behavior
   (verified at `sub_1444DB480` line 73 -- see RE-PLAYERSTATE-REPLAYOUT.md).
   If the AoC implementer overrode `GetLifetimeReplicatedProps`
   with non-default DOREPLIFETIME order, handles could differ.

2. **AoC subclasses inherit the parent's PropertyLinks order**:
   the AoC subclass adds properties at the END. So a stock
   `APawn` cmd_handle is unchanged on `AAoCPawn`/`ACharacter`/etc.
   To compute the full cmd_handle space for a deeply-nested class,
   sum the replicated counts up the inheritance chain.

3. **FastArray detection** scans the type-specific qwords at
   record offsets +0x38..+0x50 for an ASCII pointer to a struct
   name containing 'FastArray'. False negatives possible if the
   inner struct name uses a different convention.

4. **Subobject (UComponent) classes** are subobjects on actors;
   they replicate via FObjectReplicator on a per-component basis.
   The handle space is local to the component class -- it does
   NOT chain into the actor's parent class.

5. **Boolean property offsets** are not the simple field-byte-offset; the +0x30 field encodes a bit-mask + word
   offset for packed bitfields.  Marked with `?` in the offset
   column.

## Confidence summary

| Fact | Confidence |
|---|---|
| Class strings exist as UTF-16LE in `.rdata` | VERIFIED-FROM-CODE (binary scan) |
| Property records walked from class slot | VERIFIED-FROM-CODE (struct fields read directly) |
| PropertyLinks array = registration order | VERIFIED-FROM-CODE (UE5 codegen) |
| cmd_handle = 1+index of CPF_Net subset | DERIVED-FROM-RE (sub_1444DB480 line 73) |
| Property categories (Name/HP/Stats/etc.) | INFERRED-FROM-PATTERN (string matching on names) |
| FastArray classification | INFERRED-FROM-PATTERN (struct-name probe) |
